Brayan Londono

Tampa, FL | (813) 407 - 0629 | brayanlondono.pm@gmail.com | LinkedIn

PRODUCT LEADERSHIP SUMMARY

ROI-driven product manager with 5+ years of experience across GenAI, SaaS, and venture capital. Scaled 0→1 AI products to 115K+ users, drove $240K ARR, and advised startups on $35M+ in funding. Combines PM execution with strategy and deep market insight from VC experience.

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Product Manager | Founder — Resume Tailor AI Jun 2023 – Present
  • Scaled subscription funnel from 0 to 2K paid users (115K+ total signups), growing ARR to $240K with 10% MRR growth.
  • Led a team of 5 to launch "Live Edit & Compare," an AI feature that let users toggle between original and AI-edited resumes, boosting retention by 50% and growing to 10K+ MAU.
  • Owned growth funnel end-to-end: 15% signup conversion, 8% free-to-paid, 12% churn; improved retention 50% via personalized onboarding and trial experiments.
  • Conducted 100+ customer interviews and 12 A/B tests on onboarding, pricing and UX, lifting feature engagement 30%.
Venture Capital Analyst — TampaBay.Ventures Oct 2022 – Jun 2023
  • Advised 10+ startups on data-driven product strategy, supporting a $35M Series A-2 raise and expansion into 12 states.
  • Partnered with C-suite at 10+ startups to define North-Star metrics and GTM plans, accelerating Series A raises ($35M) and cutting time-to-funding 50%.
Venture Analyst — EY (Ernst & Young) Jun 2022 – Aug 2022
  • Led product validation for AI-powered enterprise tools, using rapid experimentation and iterative feedback loops to support a $20M Series A raise.
  • Collaborated with design to run usability tests and refine key flows for CoachConvo, an enterprise AI soft-skills training platform, improving UX, increasing engagement by 25%.
Founding Product Manager — Apollo Medical Jan 2020 – Jan 2022
  • Launched a digital health platform from scratch, scaling to 5,000 users and increasing engagement by 20% through iterative onboarding, user feedback loops, and MVP optimization.
Admissions Coordinator — Acadia Healthcare Jan 2017 – Feb 2020
  • Streamlined patient intake workflow by identifying manual bottlenecks and implementing automation, reducing processing time by 20% and improving staff efficiency.

EDUCATION

BS, Econometrics & Quantitative Economics — University of South Florida

SKILLS

Generative AI, Product Development, NLP, Predictive Analysis, Python, SQL, 0-to-1 Product Launches, SDLC, GTM Strategy, Monetization, A/B Testing, Prioritization, Competitive Analysis, Market Research, User Interviews, Cross-Functional Team Leadership, Analytical Thinking, Figma, JIRA, Backlog Management
